keywords.job: I am the second sorcerer. I am selling spellbooks and spells.
keywords.name: You may call me Muriel.
keywords.king: The king is a patron of the arcane arts.
keywords.tibianus: The king is a patron of the arcane arts.
keywords.quentin: He has some minor magic powers.
keywords.harkath: He's not as dumb as the average fighter but a warrior nonetheless.
keywords.army: We supply the army with some sorcerer recruits now and then.
keywords.general: We supply the army with some sorcerer recruits now and then.
keywords.ferumbras: I wonder how he actually got this awesome powers.
keywords.xodet: He has our permission to sell mana fluids.
keywords.frodo: A bar is no place that suits a scholar like me.
keywords.elane: She is quite proud of her puny magic tricks.
keywords.muriel: I don't like jokes about my name!
keywords.gregor: Knights! Childs with swords. Not worth of any attention.
keywords.marvik: Marvik and his Sorcerers lack spells with real power.
keywords.bozo: He's not a jester but a poor joke himself.
keywords.oswald: Only his boss keeps him from being burned to ashes.
keywords.lugri: He is rumoured to posses some secrets our guild might find ... interesting.
keywords.lungelen: She keeps the whole wisdom of our ancestors and leads our guild.
keywords.excalibug: The enchantements on this weapon must be awesome.
keywords.news: Our guild is working on a new spell, but I won't give away any details yet.
keywords.flaming: These pits, you refer to, might be the legendary 'Pits of Inferno', also known as the 'Nightmare Pits'.
keywords.pit: They are rumoured to be hidden somewhere in the Plains of Havoc, far to the east.
keywords.pits: They are rumoured to be hidden somewhere in the Plains of Havoc, far to the east.
keywords.inferno: They are rumoured to be hidden somewhere in the Plains of Havoc, far to the east.
keywords.nightmare: They are rumoured to be hidden somewhere in the Plains of Havoc, far to the east.
keywords.wisdom: The wisdom of spellcasting is the source of power.
keywords.ancestor: There were many generations of sorcerers in the past. Today a lot of people want to join us.
keywords.sorcerer: A sorcerer spends his lifetime studying spells to gain power.
keywords.power: Of course, power is the most important thing in the universe.
keywords.vocation: Your vocation is your profession. There are four vocations in Tibia: Sorcerers, paladins, knights, and Sorcerers.
keywords.rune: Each spell, that starts with 'Ad', needs a rune. You have to hold a blank rune in one of your hands when you cast it. You can buy runes at the magic shop.
keywords.spell: Sorry, I only sell spells to Sorcerers.

texts: Greetings, ! Looking for wisdom and power, eh?
I am the second sorcerer. I am selling spellbooks and spells.

greetingPatterns.response: Greetings, %N! Looking for wisdom and power, eh?

entries.response: I sell attack rune spells and support rune spells. Which of these interests you most?
I sell attack spells, healing spells, support spells and summon spells. Which of these interests you most?
For which magic level would you like to learn a spell?
For level 0 I have 'Find Person' and 'Light'.
For level 1 I have 'Light Healing' and 'Light Magic Missile'.
For level 2 I have 'Antidote', 'Poison Field' and 'Intense Healing'.
For level 3 I have 'Great Light', 'Heavy Magic Missile' and 'Fire Field'.
For level 5 I have 'Fireball' and 'Energy Field'.
For level 9 I have 'Great Fireball' and 'Firebomb'.
For level 10 I have 'Energy Beam' and 'Creature Illusion'.
For level 14 I have 'Great Energy Beam'.
Hmm, I have no spells for this magic level, but for many magic levels from 0 to 25.
You already know how to cast this spell.
You have to be magic level %A to learn this spell.
Here you are. Look in your spellbook for the pronunciation of this spell.
Come back when you have enough money.
